% Auto-generated by make_appendix_tables.py — do not hand-edit.
\begin{table}[t]
\caption{Target-construction parameters and guards, read from the pipeline constants module and the deployment chain. The per-surface reference radii define the production anomaly labels; the two deployment guards set the correction to zero rather than extrapolating.}
\label{tab:target-params}
\footnotesize
\begin{tabular}{lp{0.60\linewidth}}
\tophline
Parameter & Value \\
\middlehline
\multicolumn{2}{l}{\textit{Cloud collocation (Sect.~3.1)}} \\
MODIS granule matching window & $\pm10$\,min before 2022; $\pm20$\,min from 2022 (Aqua free drift) \\
Cloud pixels kept & MYD35 Cloudy $+$ Uncertain (byte-1 bits 1--2); night-dominated granules skipped \\
Distance search & KD tree per latitude band of width 2.5$^\circ$ with 0.5$^\circ$ overlap buffer \\
\middlehline
\multicolumn{2}{l}{\textit{Clear-sky reference and anomaly target (Sect.~3.1)}} \\
Reference latitude window & $\pm0.25^\circ$ along the same orbit \\
Reference cloud-distance floor & ocean $\ge$5\,km (r05), land $\ge$15\,km (r15); r10 used for the common diagnostics \\
Reference population guards & $\ge$5 clear-sky soundings; reference standard deviation $\le1$\,ppm, else no label \\
Default reference floor (diagnostics) & $\ge$10\,km \\
\middlehline
\multicolumn{2}{l}{\textit{Deployment guards (applied to every corrected product)}} \\
Climatology (input) guard & correction withheld when the base XCO$_2$ exceeds the prior by $>$50\,ppm \\
Anomaly-magnitude (output) guard & correction withheld when $|\mu| > 25$\,ppm \\
\bottomhline
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
